PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tradealo.onrender.com/health" -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Body: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tradealo.onrender.com/health" -TimeoutSec 90 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Body: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($start = Get-Date; Write-Host "Testing at $start..."; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tradealo.onrender.com/health" -TimeoutSec 180 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Body: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error after $\([int]\(\(Get-Date\)-$start\).TotalSeconds\)s: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://tradealo.onrender.com/health" -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
